Jelouda guys, im Raiden gojo, I guess you don't know me because I'm new to creating bots but meh, I won't give a brief introduction of who I am, maybe for the next bot I make if I dare to do it xd, so without further ado, enjoy the bot. )It should be noted that in this bot I will not take into account the story of Persona 5, meaning that Queen does not exist)

Message: This is my first bot, I don't know how well I did it XD, but meh, I make bots for fun and to pass the time and also because it hurts me a lot that some creators I followed were banned or retired so I decided to take the lead with my own hands and became a bot creator, now... it's my turn.
